smtp.title: Email / SMTP Configuration
smtp.description: An SMTP server must be configured to send notifications and reminders by email.
smtp.send_test_help: Sends a test email with the current configuration. Please save the settings first.

oidc.title: Single Sign-On (OIDC)
oidc.enable: Enable SSO (shows login button on the login page)

general.title: General Settings
general.sso_default_role: Default Role for New SSO Users

security.purge_confirm: Delete audit log entries beyond the retention period now? This process is irreversible.
security.req_uppercase: At least one uppercase letter required
security.req_special: At least one special character required
security.brute_force_help: Locks the account after the defined number of failed login attempts for the specified duration.
security.retention_help: ISO 27001 recommends at least 12 months. Standard: 15 months (1 year + 3 months buffer).
security.cleanup_help: Automatic cleanup runs daily at 02:00. Older entries are permanently deleted.

custom_roles.title: Custom Roles
custom_roles.description: Define custom role names that you can assign directly to users in user management or use for OIDC group mapping. Each role inherits the permissions of a base role.

oidc_mappings.title: OIDC Claim Mappings
oidc_mappings.description: During SSO login, OIDC claims (e.g., groups, roles) are checked against these mappings. The first match (highest priority) sets the user's role.
oidc_mappings.no_mappings: No mappings configured — SSO users receive the default SSO role.

rbac.title: Adjust Permissions
rbac.admin_role_help: Administrators have full system-wide access. Permissions cannot be restricted for this role.

api_docs.title: REST API Documentation
api_docs.auth_help: All protected API endpoints require a Bearer JWT token:
api_docs.interactive_desc: Swagger UI with Try-It-Out – testable directly against this instance.
api_docs.spec_desc: Machine-readable specification for code generation or Postman import.

backup.create_desc: Exports the complete database and all uploaded files as a ZIP archive. Contains all tables including junction tables, users, assets, risks, incidents, policies, settings, and uploads.
backup.restore_warning_after: completely. This process cannot be undone. Please create a backup beforehand.
backup.drag_drop_help: Drag and drop ZIP backup here or click
backup.version_mismatch: Version mismatch: Backup comes from v{{backupVersion}}, current installation is v{{currentVersion}}. Please check if database schemas are compatible before restoring.
backup.proceed_warning: Proceeding will replace all current data.

confirm_modal.title: Confirm Data Loss
confirm_modal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.
confirm_modal.warning: All current database entries and uploaded files will be permanently deleted and replaced by the backup.

llm.title: AI / LLM Configuration
llm.description: Configure an AI language model for automated vendor document triage (AVV, TOM, SOC2). API keys are stored encrypted.
llm.base_url_help: For Ollama or OpenAI-compatible endpoints (e.g. LM Studio, vLLM).
llm.no_key_warning: No API key configured. Vendor triage will not work until a key is set.

dsgvo.label: GDPR / Data Protection
dsgvo.description: General Data Protection Regulation — Record of Processing Activities (Art. 30), Data Subject Rights (Art. 15–22), DPIA Workflow (Art. 35), and Data Flow Map.

tisax.label: TISAX
tisax.description: Trusted Information Security Assessment Exchange — Automotive industry requirements (VDA ISA), Label Tracking.

dora.label: DORA
dora.description: Digital Operational Resilience Act — ICT third-party register, criticality assessment, and SLA tracking under EU 2022/2554.

ai_act.label: EU AI Act
ai_act.description: AI Register according to EU 2024/1689 — risk classification (minimal/limited/high-risk/prohibited), compliance status, and technical documentation.

bcm.label: BCM
bcm.description: Business Continuity Management — Business Impact Analysis, recovery times (RTO/RPO), recovery strategies, and exercise logs.

pentest.label: Penetration Test Tracking
pentest.description: Management of penetration tests — projects, findings with severity (CVSS), remediation status, and retest tracking.

discovery.label: Network Discovery & CVE
discovery.description: Network scanning, automatic asset discovery, and CVE vulnerability matching (NVD, OSV.dev) for detected assets.

iso27001.label: ISO 27001:2022
iso27001.description: Statement of Applicability (SoA) and implementation status of all 93 Annex A controls according to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 — Organizational, People, Physical, Technological.

bsi_grundschutz.label: BSI IT-Grundschutz
bsi_grundschutz.description: Requirement management according to the BSI IT-Grundschutz Compendium — modules (ISMS, ORP, CON, OPS, DER, APP, SYS, NET, INF) with basic, standard, and high requirements.

nis2.label: NIS-2 (EU 2022/2555)
nis2.description: Security measures under Art. 21 of the NIS-2 Directive and reporting obligations under Art. 23 — for essential and important entities under EU 2022/2555.

c5.label: BSI C5:2026
c5.description: BSI Cloud Computing Compliance Criteria Catalogue (C5:2026) — 174 criteria in 18 domains for cloud providers and their customers.
features: Gap Analysis for BSI Attestation Preparation

mcp.label: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
mcp.description: AI Integration — Provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server at /mcp through which AI assistants like Claude can query assets, manage risks, and create security incidents.
